local.comment: Local development uses debug provider. Set debug token in browser console for testing.

development.comment: Development environment uses reCAPTCHA v3 for web clients.

staging.comment: Staging environment uses reCAPTCHA v3 for web clients.

production.comment: Production environment uses reCAPTCHA Enterprise for enhanced security.

enforcement.comment: App Check is enforced for all Firebase services in non-local environments.

localWorkflow.comment: For local emulator testing, App Check is disabled or uses debug tokens to prevent blocking legitimate development traffic.
steps: 2. Get debug token from browser console on first load
3. Add debug token to Firebase Console > App Check > Debug tokens
4. Refresh the app to use the registered debug token
